data.title: Speaker Mike Johnson Says Government Must 'Eliminate People On Medicaid' Who Are 'Not Actually Eligible To Be There'
data.description: Speaker Johnson wants ineligible recipients removed from Medicaid to safeguard resources for qualified individuals.

data.title: Elon Musk, Jack Dorsey Call For Abolition Of All Intellectual Property Laws Arguing There Are 'Much Greater Models To Pay Creators'
data.description: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA), and Jack Dorsey, co-founder of Twitter (currently X) as well as Square, now called Block Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) have ignited a debate over intellectual property rights. The tech magnates have suggested a complete eradication of IP laws, a move that has stirred controversy in the tech industry.

data.title: Crypto Czar David Sacks Reveals Three Must-Read Books On The U.S.-China Tariff Dispute Alongside A 'Bonus' Read
data.description: David Sacks, the South African-American tech investor best known for his role in shaping startups like PayPal has highlighted four books he deems vital for making sense of global tensions, particularly amid escalating U.S. tariff disputes and rivalry with China.

data.title: Apple's  iPhone Stockpile Could Disrupt Supply Chain Amid Looming Chip Tariffs, Warns Top Analyst — Identifies Cupertino's Best Option Beyond White House Talks
data.description: Apple has temporarily avoided steep U.S. tariffs on China-made products, but analyst Ming-Chi Kuo warns the company's preemptive iPhone stockpile and ongoing trade risks could disrupt its supply chain—making India-based production its best long-term safeguard.

data.title: US Stock Futures, Nikkei Climb On Trump's Electronics Tariff Pause: iPhone Parts Makers Surge In Tokyo
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up following President Donald Trump's decision to pause tariffs on consumer electronics products on Sunday, following a whirlwind week for the markets.
